title: 3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering
main_contribution: explicit anisotropic 3D Gaussians with visibility-aware rasterization and density control
main_limitation: not surface/material native; view-dependent effects may be absorbed into SH or geometry
relevance_to_selected_problem: foundation representation that motivates separating rendering quality from mesh/material quality

title: 2D Gaussian Splatting for Geometrically Accurate Radiance Fields
main_contribution: collapses 3D blobs into oriented 2D Gaussian disks and adds depth distortion / normal consistency
main_limitation: does not by itself solve reflective material or specular transport decomposition
relevance_to_selected_problem: surface primitive inherited by Ref-GS and suitable for mesh branch

title: SuGaR: Surface-Aligned Gaussian Splatting for Efficient 3D Mesh Reconstruction and High-Quality Mesh Rendering
main_contribution: surface alignment regularization plus Poisson mesh extraction and mesh-bound refinement
main_limitation: not reflection/material specific; specular evidence can still bias alignment
relevance_to_selected_problem: important mesh baseline and output protocol comparator

title: Gaussian Opacity Fields: Efficient Adaptive Surface Reconstruction in Unbounded Scenes
main_contribution: continuous opacity field and adaptive Marching Tetrahedra from 3DGS
main_limitation: not reflective/material specific
relevance_to_selected_problem: mesh extraction comparator for checking whether reflective residual corrupts opacity/surface

title: High-quality Surface Reconstruction using Gaussian Surfels
main_contribution: flattens 3D Gaussians into surfels and uses normal-depth consistency
main_limitation: not focused on reflection or PBR material mapping
relevance_to_selected_problem: normal-depth consistency design reference

title: GaussianShader: 3D Gaussian Splatting with Shading Functions for Reflective Surfaces
main_contribution: normal estimation from shortest Gaussian axis and simplified shading function
main_limitation: mainly rendering-focused; not a mesh/texture export pipeline
relevance_to_selected_problem: shows reflective appearance needs normal-aware shading but leaves asset-export gap

title: GS-IR: 3D Gaussian Splatting for Inverse Rendering
main_contribution: adds material / environment illumination and depth-derived normal regularization with baked occlusion
main_limitation: occlusion and indirect light are approximated; mesh/UV export not central
relevance_to_selected_problem: PBR decomposition baseline for material mapping comparison

title: Relightable 3D Gaussians: Realistic Point Cloud Relighting with BRDF Decomposition and Ray Tracing
main_contribution: per-Gaussian normals BRDF parameters incident lighting and point-based ray tracing visibility
main_limitation: point-based relighting rather than mesh/texture asset export; visibility precomputation cost
relevance_to_selected_problem: material and visibility comparator

title: Texture-GS: Disentangling the Geometry and Texture for 3D Gaussian Splatting Editing
main_contribution: UV mapping MLP and learnable 2D texture decouple appearance from geometry
main_limitation: texture can still bake view-dependent specular unless explicitly decomposed
relevance_to_selected_problem: key texture mapping baseline and contrast for specular-free baking

title: Ref-GS: Directional Factorization for 2D Gaussian Splatting
main_contribution: directional encoding on deferred-rendered surface plus spherical Mip-grid and geometry-light factorization
main_limitation: code lacks explicit surface/reflection branch separation for mesh/material export; UV/PBR export not implemented
relevance_to_selected_problem: selected baseline

title: EnvGS: Modeling View-Dependent Appearance with Environment Gaussian
main_contribution: explicit environment Gaussian primitives and RT-core ray tracing for high-frequency/near-field reflections
main_limitation: ray tracing cost and not focused on mesh/material export
relevance_to_selected_problem: near-field reflection reference and alternative target

title: Reflective Gaussian Splatting
main_contribution: physically based deferred rendering plus Gaussian-grounded inter-reflection and material-aware normal propagation
main_limitation: publication/code status needs verification; complex physical approximation depends on geometry/material quality
relevance_to_selected_problem: important prior for reflection/PBR but not chosen due code uncertainty

title: IRGS: Inter-Reflective Gaussian Splatting with 2D Gaussian Ray Tracing
main_contribution: differentiable 2D Gaussian ray tracing and full rendering equation for indirect radiance
main_limitation: computationally heavier and code status needs verification
relevance_to_selected_problem: physics-heavy alternative; useful for ablation discussion

title: SVG-IR: Spatially-Varying Gaussian Splatting for Inverse Rendering
main_contribution: spatially varying Gaussian attributes and physically-based indirect lighting
main_limitation: venue/code status needs verification; representation complexity
relevance_to_selected_problem: material-detail capacity reference

title: GeoSplatting: Towards Geometry Guided Gaussian Splatting for Physically-based Inverse Rendering
main_contribution: bridges isosurface mesh and 3DGS for differentiable PBR with accurate normals
main_limitation: depends on mesh/isurface quality; code/venue status needs verification
relevance_to_selected_problem: mesh-guided inverse rendering reference

title: GlossyGS: Inverse Rendering of Glossy Objects with 3D Gaussian Splatting
main_contribution: micro-facet geometry segmentation prior and normal map prefiltering for glossy geometry/material
main_limitation: prior may limit generalization; code/venue status needs verification
relevance_to_selected_problem: direct glossy material ambiguity reference

title: Ref-DGS: Reflective Dual Gaussian Splatting
main_contribution: geometry Gaussians plus local reflection Gaussians plus global environment reflection field and adaptive shader
main_limitation: preprint; mesh/material export path needs verification
relevance_to_selected_problem: strong alternative target but newer/preprint status makes Ref-GS safer anchor

title: Ref-NeRF: Structured View-Dependent Appearance for Neural Radiance Fields
main_contribution: parameterizes view-dependent outgoing radiance by reflected direction and normal regularization
main_limitation: not GS; not mesh/PBR asset oriented
relevance_to_selected_problem: reflection direction and normal quality theoretical basis

title: NeRFReN: Neural Radiance Fields with Reflections
main_contribution: separate transmitted and reflected radiance fields to avoid reflected virtual image as geometry
main_limitation: decomposition underconstrained; not GS/mesh oriented
relevance_to_selected_problem: branch-separation conceptual prior

title: NeRFactor: Neural Factorization of Shape and Reflectance Under an Unknown Illumination
main_contribution: decomposes normals visibility albedo BRDF and lighting after NeRF distillation
main_limitation: slow NeRF pipeline; not GS or mesh-texture direct
relevance_to_selected_problem: PBR decomposition and priors reference

title: NeRO: Neural Geometry and BRDF Reconstruction of Reflective Objects from Multiview Images
task: reflective object geometry and BRDF reconstruction
main_contribution: two-step geometry then BRDF/light optimization using split-sum approximation and integrated directional encoding
main_limitation: not GS; heavier neural rendering pipeline
relevance_to_selected_problem: staged reflective geometry/material optimization reference
